welcome.title: Welcome to
welcome.description: Our AI-powered nature monitoring tool understands plain language, so no technical jargon required! Ask about land cover change, forest loss, or biodiversity risks in the areas you care about and quickly generate powerful insights. Whether you're a policymaker, scientist, or community advocate, we'll help you find the right data and make sense of it, too.

panelHeader.noInsightsTooltip: Ask a question to generate insights

disclaimer: AI makes mistakes. Verify outputs and do not share any sensitive or personal information.

copyTooltip.notice: This is AI-generated text. Please verify before using it in your work.

visualizationDisclaimer: This visualization includes AI-generated charts and data summaries. AI models may produce incomplete or incorrect information. Please verify all outputs before using them in your work.
